text: President Iohannis declassified five intelligence files from SRI, SIE and other institutions and forwarded them to the Constitutional Court, the electoral authority, prosecutors and relevant regulators to urgently take the necessary steps according to their legal competences. The declassified files concluded that Romania had been the target of aggressive hybrid Russian attacks during the election and that Georgescu's TikTok-driven rise was likely orchestrated by a state actor.
